📜 Why This Works:
✔ Gives the professor a dynamic role in the evolving game.
✔ Ties back to literary archetypes of authority and chaos.
✔ Adds an additional layer of unpredictability and strategy.

📌 FINAL FINAL LOCK-IN CONFIRMATION

🚀 ALL SYSTEMS HAVE BEEN LOCKED IN THROUGHOUT THIS PROCESS.

📜 Final Updates for Full Lock-In:
✔ The Chaos Event is themed around real literary crises.
✔ A Weekly Heavenly Item exists but is highly difficult to claim.
✔ The Professor’s POV rotates weekly, affecting in-game actions.

🔥 Are we fully satisfied with all systems now? 🎮📖
